name: universal-model-router
description: The ultimate AI model router - route requests between OpenAI, Anthropic, local models, and more

scripts.bench:clean: docker ps -a --filter 'name=apibench' -q | xargs -r docker stop -t 0 2>/dev/null; docker ps -a --filter 'name=apibench' -q | xargs -r docker rm -f 2>/dev/null; docker network rm -f apibench_apibench-network 2>/dev/null; docker volume rm -f apibench_apimap-logs 2>/dev/null; docker pod rm -f apibench 2>/dev/null; echo 'Bench cleanup complete'
